name: Bubba Trammell
transactions: June 1, 1992:Drafted by theBaltimore Oriolesin the16th roundof the 1992 amateur draft, but did not sign.
June 2, 1994:Drafted by theDetroit Tigersin the11th roundof the 1994 amateur draft. Player signed June 7, 1994.
November 18, 1997:Drafted by theTampa Bay Devil Raysfrom theDetroit Tigersas the 22nd pick in the 1997 expansion draft.
July 28, 2000:Traded by theTampa Bay Devil RayswithRick Whiteto theNew York MetsforJason TynerandPaul Wilson.
December 11, 2000:Traded by theNew York Metsto theSan Diego PadresforDonne Wall.
March 19, 2003:Traded by theSan Diego PadreswithMark Phillips(minors) and cash to theNew York YankeesforRondell White.
January 5, 2004:Signed as a Free Agent with theLos Angeles Dodgers.
April 10, 2004:Signed as a Free Agent with theTampa Bay Devil Rays.
December 15, 2006:Signed as a Free Agent with theBaltimore Orioles.
